summary: Cycle 76 product progress review completed. CRITICAL FINDING: Zero development velocity for 8+ cycles. No new completed work since last review. 14 P0 stories remain unassigned (STORY-001 through STORY-014), blocking all Phase 1 progress. STORY-015 stalled at 50%. Phase gate: 3.3% P0 completion vs 80% requirement (76.7pp gap). ESCALATION TO GM: Project management function not executing on core assignment responsibility. Organizational dysfunction blocking technical progress. Recommend GM directly assign P0 stories if ProjM remains inactive.
